confidence_note: Inference is deterministic: fixed seeds, fixed preprocessing, inference-only execution, and no random augmentation during prediction.

diagnostics.evaluation_note: Confusion-matrix style evaluation artifacts were not found in the runtime package. If you have validation labels, compute confusion matrices offline after each training run.
retraining_recommendations: Use a more balanced dataset across all waste classes.
Clean mislabeled samples and verify class folders carefully.
Collect more images per class from varied lighting and backgrounds.
Keep class distribution consistent between training, validation, and test sets.
Use the exact same resize and normalization pipeline during training and inference.

note: No trained MobileNetV2 model file was found. The API now runs a deterministic fallback classifier for stability, but real accuracy still depends on a trained model.
